Emotional Reinforcement.comment: I think that the overall concept and metaphor that is created can have a strong emotional impact. The high realism maybe helps as well.

visualElements.comment:
Size, shape and color encode the same variable of levels of PM10 (particulate matters). High PM10 indicates air pollution.
Real material use (but highly abstract)

visualChannels.comment:
The shape becomes more spiky, which relates indirectly to the feeling bad quality of air when breathing. They look like clouds as well.
The context is very indirect --- in the sense that the spikiness is designed to be felt as pain.

visualElements.comment: I think that we have a special layout in a necklace structure, functioning as a visual metaphor.
The placement within the bodily context also reinforces the metaphor and negative impact.
